dc:title: Street view beside historic stone walls and domed church
dc:description: Color negative-style street scene showing an urban roadway running alongside large historic stone fortification walls on the left. A church or civic building with a prominent ribbed dome rises behind the wall near the center of the image. In the foreground, out-of-focus bicycle handlebars and a saddle frame the lower portion of the view, suggesting the photograph was taken from or near a parked bicycle. Cars and a small van travel along the curved road, with a pedestrian visible on the sidewalk beside the wall. On the right, a leafy tree, streetlamp, sidewalk, and outdoor seating area border the street. The image is brightly lit under a clear blue sky, with visible film grain and warm late-afternoon sunlight.
